# Copilot code review — devantler-tech/actions

This repo is a **composite GitHub Actions library** (one `<action>/action.yaml` + `README.md` per
action) consumed by CI/CD across every devantler-tech product. Sibling to
[reusable-workflows](https://github.com/devantler-tech/reusable-workflows). Canonical conventions live
in [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) / [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md); this is the concise review
checklist — flag violations of the rules below.

## Always (every PR)

- **Conventional-Commit PR title** (`feat:`/`fix:`/`docs:`/`ci:`/`chore:`/`refactor:`/`test:`). The
  squash-merge title feeds the release workflow + changelog, so a non-conventional or bracket-prefixed
  title is a defect.
- **Root-cause fixes only.** Flag anything that masks a failure instead of fixing it: a test job set
  `continue-on-error` or deleted to dodge red CI, weakened assertions, `--no-verify`, a silenced or
  skipped `zizmor` / `actionlint` check.
- **Behaviour / input / output change ⇒ docs updated in the same PR.** Update the action's own
  `README.md` (per the CONTRIBUTING template) **and** the Actions table in the repo `README.md`; a
  missing doc update is a finding.
- **No secrets in plaintext** — flag committed tokens or keys, and `${{ secrets.* }}` echoed into logs.
- PRs from the Daily AI Assistant carry a `> 🤖 Generated by the Daily AI Assistant` line — expected,
  not a finding.

## Composite actions

- **Blast radius first:** each action has many consumer repos, so changes must be **additive and
  backward-compatible**. Flag a renamed/removed/retyped `input` or `output` unless it's called out as a
  deliberate breaking change (prefer keeping an alias).
- **Naming:** action directory = `<active-verb>-<purpose>` (e.g. `setup-go-toolchain`); `inputs` and
  `outputs` are **kebab-case** (`app-id`, `github-token`). Flag deviations.
- Prefer **composite** actions over JavaScript/Docker.
- Every `action.yaml` sets `author: devantler-tech`; each declared `run` step has a `shell:`, and every
  referenced `input`/`output` is declared.
- A **new action** needs a matching `test-<action-name>` job in `.github/workflows/ci.yaml`, with
  `persist-credentials: false` on its `actions/checkout` step — flag a new action without one.

## CI & security

- **Pin third-party actions** (non-`actions/*`, non-`github/*`, non-`devantler-tech/*`) to a full
  commit SHA with a `# v<version>` comment — enforced by `zizmor.yml`; flag unpinned or tag-pinned refs.
- Every workflow's **first step** is `step-security/harden-runner`; keep workflows `actionlint`-clean.
- Bundle Dependabot `github_actions` bumps; call out **major** bumps explicitly.
- Never weaken a security control (harden-runner, SHA pin, `persist-credentials: false`) to make a
  check pass.

Copilot code review reads this file + `.github/instructions/**/*.instructions.md` at **≤4000 chars**
and does **not** read `AGENTS.md` — when unsure, defer to [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) and
[`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
